title: Trident CF record
description: One line of failures.jsonl. The SSOT for a single observed failure mode. Generalized/sanitized: no personal paths, names, or company references in a committed record.

id.description: CF-NNN. NNN = (max existing id) + 1, read from the last line only. Never reused.

date.description: ISO date the failure was observed, or null.

tags.description: e.g. instruction-following, hallucination, self-violation, context-degradation, judge-bias, tool-use, permission-model, bulk-refactor, state-loss, pattern-cargo-culting.

status.description: Lifecycle. 'recurred' = fired again after a guard existed (strongest signal to move the guard into a detector).

guard.description: One-line behavioral rule that prevents this exact failure.

pattern.description: Generalized 1-2 sentence pattern. No personal specifics.

kind.description: Auditor runs deterministic > structural > llm-judge, in that order (FL-cf051).

signal.description: The FAIL signature — what the check flags.

enterprise_environments.description: Where this failure predictably recurs in real deployments, each as 'env: how it manifests'. Generic categories only — no personal/company specifics.

pm_implication.description: Reusable design lesson(s) — the public IP. String or list of strings.

origin.description: Provenance note. For seeded records: 'sanitized from private log'. Never contains personal data.
